gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/364)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/364)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الذَّهَبِ يُحَلَّى بِهِ الصِّبْيَانُ فَقَالَ كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) يُحَلِّي وُلْدَهُ وَ نِسَاءَهُ بِالذَّهَبِ وَ الْفِضَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Ali Bin Al Noman, from Abu Al Sabbah who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the gold which the children are ornamented with. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> used to ornament his<sup>asws</sup> children and his<sup>asws</sup> wives with the gold and the silver’.
en.sarwar: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from Ali ibn al-Nu’man from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of children; if they can use gold as ornaments. He (the Imam) said that Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, allowed his children and women to use gold and silver as ornaments.’”
